zh.lifeSummary: 當Gérard I de Picquigny於1116年出生在法國皮卡迪索姆皮易尼時，他的父親Guermond de Picquigny I47歲，母親Béatrice de Daours25歲。他和Béatrice d'AUMALE至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1178年在英國達勒姆享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gérard I de Picquigny于1116年出生在法国皮卡迪索姆皮易尼时，他的父亲Guermond de Picquigny I47岁，母亲Béatrice de Daours25岁。他和Béatrice d'AUMALE至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1178年在英国達勒姆享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gérard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It is derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’. In the later Middle Ages this was a more common name than Gerald , with which it was sometimes confused. Nowadays it is less common, surviving mainly among Roman Catholics, in honour of the many saints of this name.

variants.name: Gerrard
meanings: Variant spelling of   Gerard  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Jerrard
meanings: Rare variant spelling of   Gerard  , probably influenced by the form of the modern surname, if not a transferred use.

en.lifeSummary: When Gérard I de Picquigny was born in 1116, in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, his father, Guermond de Picquigny I, was 47 and his mother, Béatrice de Daours, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Béatrice d'AUMALE. He died in 1178, in Durham, England, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gérard I de Picquigny est né en 1116, à Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, France, son père, Guermond de Picquigny I, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Béatrice de Daours, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Béatrice d'AUMALE. Il est décédé en 1178, à Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gérard I de Picquigny 1116 in Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guermond de Picquigny I 47 und seine Mutter Béatrice de Daours 25. Er hatte mit Béatrice d'AUMALE mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1178 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Durham, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard I de Picquigny è nato il nel 1116 nel Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, il suo padre, Guermond de Picquigny I, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Béatrice de Daours, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Béatrice d'AUMALE. Morì nel 1178, nel Durham, England, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gérard I de Picquignyが1116年にフランスピカーディソンメピククイグニーで生まれた時，父Guermond de Picquigny Iは47歳，母Béatrice de Daoursは25歳であった。彼はBéatrice d'AUMALEとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1178年にイギリスダルハムで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gérard I de Picquigny(이)가 1116년 프랑스 피카디 솜 피c키그니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guermond de Picquigny I(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrice de Daours(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Béatrice d'AUMALE(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1178년 영국 뒤람에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gérard I de Picquigny nasceu em 1116, em Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, França, seu pai, Guermond de Picquigny I, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Béatrice de Daours, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Béatrice d'AUMALE. Ele faleceu em 1178, em Durham, Inglaterra, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gérard I de Picquigny родился в 1116 г. в местности пиккуигни, сомм, пикарди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guermond de Picquigny I было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrice de Daours, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Béatrice d'AUMALE. Он умер в 1178 г. в местности дурам, Англия в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gérard I de Picquigny nació en 1116, en Picquigny, Somme, Picardie, Francia, su papá, Guermond de Picquigny I, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Béatrice de Daours, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Béatrice d'AUMALE. Murió en 1178, en Durham, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años.
